problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Cortical. Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
